title: Live Thesis Tracker
subtitle: Investment Monitoring Dashboard
intro: Thesis monitor first: what is claimed, what would change the view, and how evidence is logged over time. Market levels are supporting context—useful for discipline, not the core argument.
leadPositions: These names express the thesis in §I—they are not presented as a diversified portfolio. Read thesis state (badges) and each line’s view before prices; quotes refresh as a secondary check.
leadKpis: Observables outside equity marks. Entries are manual for now; structure is ready if a source is later wired.
